## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Teero and GrowthX to discuss conversion design changes, content strategy, and analytics updates.](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Conversion design changes discussed with Teero's designer; implementation in progress](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Focus on AI-related dental content for investor visibility; hygienist-focused content expansion](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [New automated SERP feature change notifications to be forwarded to shared channel](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [PostHog analytics tool to be used for tracking hygienist app conversions from content](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

## Topics

### Conversion Design Updates

  - [Jacob met with Teero's designer earlier in the week](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Changes not yet implemented, but work in progress](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Prioritization and rationale discussed for better understanding](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Some to-dos for Jacob on second and third priority items](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [V1 plan to add text FAQs to pages before backend development](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Two main themes driving traffic:](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
    1.  AI applications in dental industry (investor-focused)
    2.  Hygienist-related topics (career, licensing, etc.)
  - [Expanding keyword research for AI-related dental topics](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Competitor analysis: Wisdom Dental (raised $20M Series A) identified as benchmark](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Plan to replicate Wisdom Dental's content strategy and track new content](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Manual update of blog leads (currently 32 total, up from 26)](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Monthly updates preferred for blog lead reporting](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [SEMrush traffic drop likely a database issue, not a cause for concern](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [PostHog analytics tool to be used for tracking hygienist app conversions from content](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)

### SERP Feature Notifications

  - [GrowthX engineering team set up automated notifications for SERP feature changes](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Test run completed; notifications to be forwarded to shared channel starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Provides visibility on keyword changes, volume, and ranking improvements](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Teero to implement conversion design changes and notify GrowthX of go-live dates](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [GrowthX to expand keyword research on AI-related dental topics](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze and replicate Wisdom Dental's content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Nate to investigate PostHog for hygienist app conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [GrowthX to start forwarding SERP feature change notifications to shared channel](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Monthly manual updates of blog leads to continue](https://fathom.video/share/A3UohmBVWzSrKbDfdin1wJ3HaCvi31j6?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
